package rulecoverage

func PositiveUpdateSingleRowInLoopWithoutBatch() string {
    ruleID := "update_single_row_in_loop_without_batch"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "GORM Update(...), UpdateColumn(...), or Updates(...) calls observed inside loops one row at a time."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
